home.hero_title: The truth of every incident, open to all.
home.hero_subtitle: Verified profiles of victims and accused, primary evidence and case timelines — in an independent community archive.
home.trust_verify_body: Every published case is reviewed by trained moderators before going live.
home.trust_evidence_body: Source documents and media are stored with checksums and chain-of-custody.
home.trust_languages_body: Authored in Bengali, navigable in English — without losing nuance.
home.features_title: A public archive built for accountability.
home.features_subtitle: Browse, search, contribute and verify — with controls that fit each role.
home.feat_browse_body: Filter by location, crime type, year, or tag. Every case has a permanent number.
home.feat_timeline_body: Reconstruct what happened, with sources cited at every step.
home.feat_people_body: Victims, accused and witnesses are each tracked across the cases they appear in.
home.feat_verify_body: Moderators triage submissions through a transparent, audited workflow.
home.recent_subtitle: The latest cases that finished review.
home.cta_title: Help build a public, accountable record.
home.cta_subtitle: Anyone can browse. Verified contributors can submit. The community is reviewed by moderators.
home.preview_summary: A representative case card — title, summary, evidence count, and verification status.

forbidden.title: Access denied
forbidden.message: You do not have permission to view this page.

login.title: Log in
login.subtitle: Sign in to your account.
login.error_generic: Could not log in. Please try again.

register.title: Register
register.subtitle: Submit a registration request. Your account will be active after admin approval.
register.error_generic: Could not register. Please try again.

register_pending.title: Application received
register_pending.message: Your account is awaiting admin approval. You will be able to log in once it is approved.

forgot.title: Reset your password
forgot.subtitle: Enter your account email. If a matching account exists, we'll send a reset link.
forgot.sent_message: If your email is registered, a reset link is on its way. Please check your inbox (and spam folder).
forgot.error_generic: Could not start the reset. Please try again.

reset.title: Choose a new password
reset.subtitle: Pick a strong password you don't use elsewhere.
reset.too_short: Password must be at least 10 characters.
reset.invalid_message: The reset link did not include a token. Please request a new email.
reset.error_generic: Could not reset the password. The link may have expired.

search.title: Search
search.idle_message: Type a title, case number, or name and press Enter.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure branding, email, storage, and feature flags.

branding.identity_help: Names and tagline shown across the portal.
branding.visuals_help: Colour palette and assets. Live-applied to the running app.
branding.logo_help: PNG or SVG. Leave empty to use the default mark.

email.identity_help: From identity and active provider. Secrets are encrypted at rest.
email.enabled_help: When off, no transactional emails are sent.
email.test_help: Tries the current form values (typed and saved).
email.test_ok: Test message accepted by the provider.

storage.driver_help: All drivers are S3-compatible. Switching providers is allowed at any time — existing object keys remain valid.
storage.public_base_url_help: CDN or public bucket URL prefix used to serve public attachments.
storage.force_path_style_help: Required for MinIO and most self-hosted setups.
storage.test_help: Sends a HEAD/CreateBucket against the bucket to verify credentials.

features.banner_help: Show a coloured banner above every page.
features.maintenance_help: Public pages keep working; submissions and admin writes are blocked while on.

dashboard.title: Admin dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Key metrics and pending work at a glance.

approvals.title: User approvals
approvals.subtitle: Approve or reject newly registered users.

users.title: User management
users.subtitle: Browse all users; change role and status.

cases.title: Case management
cases.subtitle: Every case from draft to published.

persons.title: Person approvals
persons.subtitle: Review and publish victim / accused / witness profiles.

case.internal_notes_help: Visible only to admins. Never shown to the public.
case.verify_reason_help: A reason is recommended when rejecting.
case.confirm_delete: Are you sure? This will permanently delete the case.

verification.title: Verification
verification.subtitle: Cases assigned to you for review and the full verification queue.
verification.mine_help: Cases assigned to you, awaiting review.
verification.all_help: Every verification assignment in the system.

audit.title: Audit log
audit.subtitle: Append-only record of every privileged action.

cases.title: All cases
cases.subtitle: Public archive of verified, published cases.

persons.title: Profiles
persons.subtitle: Published victim, accused, and witness profiles.
persons.no_cases: No published cases yet for this profile.

my_cases.title: My submissions
my_cases.subtitle: Every case you have filed.
my_cases.new_subtitle: Fill in the basics to create a draft. You can attach people and evidence afterwards.
my_cases.empty_message: Click below to file your first case.
my_cases.evidence_help: Files upload directly to the configured object store. They go public after admin review.
my_cases.error_generic: Could not save. Please try again.
